title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind's Deep Research API enables developers to build agents powered by Gemini that perform comprehensive research tasks. The API leverages DeepMind innovations and is available through Google Cloud for application implementation.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers the Deep Research API, which lets developers build Gemini-powered agents that carry out comprehensive research tasks. The API draws on Google DeepMind innovations and is available through Google Cloud for application implementation. The takeaway: research-oriented AI agents can now be integrated into applications via a Google Cloud endpoint rather than built from scratch.
